methodsAttempted.query: site:ugs.hust.edu.cn 华中科技大学 人工智能 教育 赋能 教学 研究 专项 2025
methodsAttempted.notes: Undergraduate School results located the 2025 undergraduate-program revision notice and AI teaching workshop coverage.
Verified ugs.hust.edu.cn, gs.hust.edu.cn, and kexie.hust.edu.cn as official HUST-controlled domains by university domain suffix and page branding.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found one undergraduate training-plan notice with concrete AI-education requirements and one Graduate School AI summer-training notice. A DeepSeek workshop page was official but event/news-like, and an academic-misconduct page was official but not AI-specific.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: 学校倡导严谨学风和学术诚信，坚持学术自由，鼓励学术创新，宽容失败，反对学术活动中的各种学术不端行为。

stopConditions: Stop after official HUST pages support narrow teaching and AI-training claims.
Do not infer approved-tool, assessment, privacy, or research rules from workshop/news pages.
Do not use general academic-integrity rules as AI-tool policy unless the source mentions AI-specific conduct.
Do not stage raw HTML, PDFs, screenshots, browser profiles, or logs in Git.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于修订2025级本科专业人才培养方案的通知
关于举办华中科技大学研究生人工智能暑期培训班的通知

artifacts.claimText: Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Undergraduate School notice for revising 2025 undergraduate training plans says AI education is to be fully included in the 2025 undergraduate professional training plans, including two required public AI courses in the general education foundation curriculum.
artifacts.normalizedValue: 2025 undergraduate training-plan revision includes required AI education courses

citation.publisher: 华中科技大学本科生院
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Huazhong University of Science and Technology's Graduate School announced a 2025 summer AI training class for enrolled graduate students, with content covering AI fundamentals, AI safety and ethics, machine learning, deep learning, and large-model technology principles and applied practice.
artifacts.normalizedValue: 2025 graduate AI summer training covers safety, ethics, and large-model application practice

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于修订2025级本科专业人才培养方案的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: （一）加强人工智能教育。将人工智能教育全面纳入2025级本科专业人才培养方案。在素质教育基础课程体系中，增设2门人工智能公共必修课程（课程教学方案详见附件2），包括“人工智能概论”（课内必修，32学时、2学分），“人工智能应用”（课外必修，16学时、1学分）。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The 2025 undergraduate training-plan notice says AI education is to be fully included and adds two required public AI courses.
artifacts.evidenceLocator: 正文，三、修订重点（一）加强人工智能教育
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于举办华中科技大学研究生人工智能暑期培训班的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 研究生院定于2025年暑期面向在校研究生开设人工智能暑期培训班。现将有关事项通知如下：一、培训内容 本次培训内容涵盖：人工智能基础原理、人工智能安全与伦理、机器学习基础理论与算法、深度学习理论、大模型技术原理与应用实践，课程设计兼顾理论深度与应用广度。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The Graduate School notice says the summer AI class is for enrolled graduate students and covers AI safety, ethics, and large-model application practice.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow undergraduate training-plan claim. It does not establish course-level AI-use permissions, assessment rules, or university-wide approved-tool policy.
Approved as a narrow Graduate School training notice claim. It does not create a graduate academic-integrity or approved-tool rule.

artifacts.title: Huazhong University of Science and Technology staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence identifies official HUST undergraduate and graduate teaching/training notices that include AI education, AI safety and ethics, and large-model application practice. No binding university-wide AI tool-use, assessment, privacy, or approved-tool policy was found in the official sources reviewed.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The DeepSeek workshop page was official but treated as event/news coverage rather than binding policy evidence.
The official academic-misconduct page was rejected for AI-policy claims because it did not mention AI-specific conduct.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
